CustomField.formula: IF( ProductNature__c = "Service", 18, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Annual") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In arrears"), 19, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Annual") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In advance"), 6, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Monthly") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In arrears"), 29, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Monthly") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In advance"), 28, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Biannual") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In arrears"), 15, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Biannual") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In advance"), 3, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Quarterly") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In arrears"), 16, IF( ISPICKVAL(BillingSchedule__c, "Quarterly") && ISPICKVAL(Term__c, "In advance"), 5, 999 /* Valeur par défaut si rien ne matche */ ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Netsuite Billing Schedule Id
